title: Mailgun vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailgun vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Mailgun and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Mailgun is built for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailgun wins for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailgun or Privy?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Mailgun?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
